title: ranunculus aconitifolius proles platanifolius
intro: Ranunculus aconitifolius proles platanifolius, also known as the broad-leaved buttercup, is a subspecies of the Ranunculus aconitifolius plant. This plant is a perennial herb with medicinal properties attributed to its roots and leaves, which contain compounds like alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Ranunculus aconitifolius proles platanifolius include its potential use as an anti-inflammatory agent, a treatment for fever, and its ability to aid in digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, but caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity when ingested in large quantities.
